description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git Docker image with a docker:dind service. Include a before_script that runs "apk update" and "apk add bash". Define a single stage named build and add four jobs—build_conda_base, build_python1, build_python2, and build_ubuntu_base—each assigned to the build stage and each executing the shell command "bash build_image.sh <image-name>" for its respective image (conda_base, python1, python2, ubuntu_base). No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
